title: meeting-note.md runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for Meetings/<date - title>.md meeting notes. Carries the historical_data_warning_pattern per-type override (Plan 81 SP13 Session 6 A47 — hook branch #2 opt-in). Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.8 (2026-05-18).
design_source: alignment/hook-branch-implementations.md Session 6 A47 (foundation-shipped opt-in for branch #2 historical-data-warning)

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh branch #2 (historical-data-warning — reads historical_data_warning_pattern for per-type override; falls back to pillar 7 universal default)
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep with branch #2 hook body

historical_data_warning_pattern_rational: Per-type override matching Meetings/ naming pattern; branch #2 fires WARN on edits to date-prefixed files where parsed_date < today.
